Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Penance]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 2''' — Penance is a weapon that can be used to remove a Dreadgod.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 2''' — Penance is a prize that can be obtained in the tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 2''' — Sopharanatoth will use Penance on Akura Malice or Northstrider.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 4''' — Penance is a weapon that Eithan might claim.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 5''' — Penance is something Reigan Shen has a chance at.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 5''' — Penance is a prize that the dragon can win in the tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Penance is a heavenly weapon that eight people are fighting for.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 11''' — Eithan can use Penance to blackmail Reigan Shen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — Penance is an item that dragons might get.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 18''' — Penance is a competition the Akura clan hopes to win.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 18''' — Penance is causing everyone to play by the rules for now.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 21''' — Penance is a threat that prevents enemy Heralds from attacking Fury.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 22''' — Penance is someone who would kill Malice if Yerin loses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Reigan Shen stated his actions had nothing to do with Penance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Penance is a technique that could be used on Malice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Penance is beyond the reach of the Monarchs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Penance is an arrow that is going to kill Sophara's great-grandfather.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Penance is a silver-edged black arrowhead handed to Yerin by an Abidan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Penance is described as feeling like death and finality.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Penance is something Yerin can use.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Penance prevented Seshethkunaaz from becoming a Remnant.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 2''' — Penance is a weapon that had instantly slain a Monarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 10''' — Penance is an arrowhead of absolute death created by Ozmanthus.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 14''' — Penance is a prize gifted to Yerin by the Abidan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 21''' — Penance created prototypes.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 2''' — Penance is a Monarch-killing weapon of Ozmanthus's creation.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 5''' — Penance is a one-of-a-kind, single-use weapon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 9''' — Penance arrows are a test of will for Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — Penance is an arrowhead that was the prize offered by the Abidan for the Uncrowned King tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — The Penance arrow sought its prey.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — Penance is an arrow unleashed by Mercy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — The true Penance does not require contact or being shot from a bow to function.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — The true Penance functions by deciding who is dead.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 21''' — The cracks in Mercy's madra channels carried authority from Penance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Penance is an absolute decree of death used by Yerin to strike down a Monarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 28''' — Mercy loosed an attack called Penance.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
